coreIssue: This 1:1 is likely about whether a junior Product Designer three months in has enough clarity and support to work through shifting priorities confidently.
openingQuestion: What feels hardest to navigate right now when requirements shift and you are trying to understand what good looks like in your role?
listenFor: whether he names a specific recent change in requirements and what happened next
whether he hesitates or speaks vaguely when asked what success looks like over the next few weeks
if they mention a person, meeting, or moment where asking for help felt easy or risky
avoid: do not turn this exploratory check-in into a correction or reassurance monologue
do not assume the issue is confidence alone if he points to team setup or unclear ownership
goodOutcome: You and Kenji have agreed what good junior Product Designer performance looks like for the next few weeks and one concrete support point you will provide when priorities shift.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent example of changing requirements on Kenji's work so you can ground the conversation in a real situation instead of general impressions.
